message.entry: Trailing input arguments must occur in name-value pairs.
'BinCounts'' cannot be set if any of ''NumBins'',''BinWidth'', ''BinMethod'', ''XBinLimits'', or ''YBinLimits'' is set, and it must be a matrix of size [length(XBinEdges)-1 length(YBinEdges)-1].
When ''BinCountsMode'' is set to ''manual'', ''BinCounts'' must be set.
When ''XBinLimitsMode'' is set to ''manual'', ''XBinEdges'' or ''XBinLimits'' must be set.
When ''YBinLimitsMode'' is set to ''manual'', ''YBinEdges'' or ''YBinLimits'' must be set.
XBinEdges must be a vector of length greater than or equal to 2.
YBinEdges must be a vector of length greater than or equal to 2.
FaceColor must be ''flat'' when ''DisplayStyle'' is set to ''tile''.
FaceLighting must be ''none'' when ''DisplayStyle'' is set to ''tile''.
BinMethod cannot be set to ''manual''.
{0} input is not a valid color.
''XBinEdges'' input cannot be followed by any of ''NumBins'',''BinWidth'', ''BinMethod'', or ''XBinLimits''.
''YBinEdges'' input cannot be followed by any of ''NumBins'',''BinWidth'', ''BinMethod'', or ''YBinLimits''.
The length of ''XBinEdges'' must be one longer than the number of rows of ''BinCounts'' when ''BinCountsMode'' is ''manual''.
The length of ''YBinEdges'' must be one longer than the number of columns of ''BinCounts'' when ''BinCountsMode'' is ''manual''.
When X and Y inputs are non-empty, BinCounts cannot be set.
X and Y inputs must be numeric or logical and they must have the same size.
When ''BinCountsMode'' is set to ''auto'', ''BinCounts'' cannot be set.
When ''XBinLimitsMode'' is set to ''auto'', ''XBinEdges'' or ''XBinLimits'' cannot be set.
When ''YBinLimitsMode'' is set to ''auto'', ''YBinEdges'' or ''YBinLimits'' cannot be set.
{0} cannot be set when BinCountsMode is ''manual''.
Transparency is not supported with software OpenGL renderer. Consider setting figure renderer to ''painters''.
{0} is not supported when BinCountsMode is ''manual''.
Value
X bin edges
Y bin edges
